meta.title: Study Hour | GCSE Revision Planner and Study Schedule App
meta.description: Help GCSE students decide what to revise next with a revision planner based on exam timing, weaker topics, and recent study. No account needed. Works offline.
meta.ogTitle: Study Hour | GCSE Revision Planner and Study Schedule App
meta.ogDescription: Help GCSE students decide what to revise next with a revision planner based on exam timing, weaker topics, and recent study. No account needed. Works offline.
meta.twitterDescription: Help GCSE students decide what to revise next based on exam timing, weaker topics, and recent study.

hero.headline: Know what to revise next, not just when to revise.
hero.subheadline: Study Hour helps GCSE students build a revision plan around exam timing, weaker topics, and what they have not reviewed recently.

sectionHeadings.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to a smarter revision plan

steps.title: Pick your subjects
steps.description: Select what you're sitting. Every paper, topic, and exam date is mapped automatically.

steps.title: See what matters today
steps.description: A prioritised revision list that shifts daily based on exam dates, weaker topics, and what you have already covered.

steps.title: Study with focus
steps.description: Start a timed session on the right topic. Rate your confidence when you finish.

scenarios.situation: I don't know what to revise next
scenarios.response: The app looks at every exam date, your confidence scores, and what you've already covered — then gives you one clear recommendation.

scenarios.situation: I keep revising the same subjects
scenarios.response: Weak topics and neglected areas surface automatically so you can tackle them before they become last-minute panic revision.

scenarios.situation: I can't tell if revision is working
scenarios.response: Track sessions, confidence, and momentum across every subject — so you can see progress building over time.

trustFeatures.title: GCSE coverage built in, A-Level via custom setup
trustFeatures.description: GCSE subjects, papers, and topics are pre-mapped to current exam boards. A-Level and other qualifications are supported through custom subject creation.

trustFeatures.title: Custom subjects
trustFeatures.description: Add any subject not in the default list. Useful for less common courses or school-specific content.

trustFeatures.title: Works offline
trustFeatures.description: All data stays on your device. No account required. Use it anywhere, with or without internet.

trustFeatures.title: Suitable for classrooms
trustFeatures.description: No sign-up, no tracking, no ads. Teachers and schools can recommend it with confidence.
